mapper.sql: select t.id, b.site_id, b.category_id, t.title, t.keywords, t.reference_content, t.source_name, t.source_url, t.import_batch, t.usage_status, t.used_count, t.used_time, t.used_article_ids, t.priority, t.tags, t.extra_data, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_title_pool t left join gb_title_pool_batch b on t.import_batch COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = b.batch_code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci left join gb_categories c on b.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_title_pool
title, keywords, reference_content, source_name, source_url, import_batch, usage_status, used_count, used_time, used_article_ids, priority, tags, extra_data, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{title}, #{keywords}, #{referenceContent}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceUrl}, #{importBatch}, #{usageStatus}, #{usedCount}, #{usedTime}, #{usedArticleIds}, #{priority}, #{tags}, #{extraData}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete: update gb_title_pool set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_title_pool set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from gb_title_pool where title = #{title} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from gb_title_pool where del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from gb_title_pool where usage_status = '1' and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from gb_title_pool where usage_status = '0' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update gb_title_pool set usage_status = '1', used_count = used_count + 1, used_time = now(), used_article_ids = CONCAT(IFNULL(used_article_ids, ''), IF(used_article_ids IS NULL OR used_article_ids = '', '', ','), #{articleId}) where id = #{id}
